body:
After some discussion, we decided to just remove the broken
function because it is not used.

I think this technically is a breaking change. Should I add a note to NEWS.md, or is it ok not to?






Added, and then Reverted the following

Add DynamicAdaptor to CNMExt

The latest Adapt release, v4.5.0, changes the behavior of adapt
when used on StaticArray(s). Previously, adapt would not recurse into
static arrays by default. To avoid this default behavior, this commit
defines a new empty type used for dispatch, following the pattern used in CUDA.jl
title: Remove make_dynamic_model from ConstrainedNeuralModelsExt
